zh.title: 珍妮·狄克逊预言全集 - 美国最著名的通灵预言家预言与验证 | Jeane Dixon Prophecies
zh.description: 美国最著名的通灵预言家珍妮·狄克逊（1904-1997）的预言完整收录与验证。她因成功预言肯尼迪遇刺而闻名，同时也因大量错误预言催生了著名的「狄克逊效应」。
zh.keywords: 珍妮狄克逊,狄克逊预言,Jeane Dixon,肯尼迪遇刺预言,狄克逊效应,美国预言家,水晶球预言,通灵预言
zh.ogTitle: 珍妮·狄克逊预言全集 | Jeane Dixon Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 美国通灵预言家珍妮·狄克逊的预言完整收录与验证分析。成功预言肯尼迪遇刺，但也催生了著名的「狄克逊效应」。
zh.twitterDescription: 珍妮·狄克逊预言全集：成功预言肯尼迪遇刺，但大量错误预言催生了「狄克逊效应」——人们只记住命中的预言，忽略错误的。

en.title: Jeane Dixon Prophecies - America's Most Famous Psychic (1904-1997) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Complete archive and verification of prophecies by Jeane Dixon (1904-1997), America's most famous psychic. Known for allegedly predicting JFK's assassination, her many wrong predictions gave rise to the 'Jeane Dixon effect'.
en.keywords: Jeane Dixon,Dixon predictions,JFK assassination prediction,Jeane Dixon effect,American psychic,crystal ball,prophecy verification
en.ogTitle: Jeane Dixon Prophecies - America's Most Famous Psychic
en.ogDescription: Complete archive and verification of Jeane Dixon's predictions. Famous for the JFK assassination prediction, her legacy also includes the 'Jeane Dixon effect' cognitive bias.
en.twitterDescription: Jeane Dixon predictions with verification. Famous for allegedly predicting JFK's assassination, her many misses gave rise to the 'Jeane Dixon effect'.
